title: Ginny and the Birth of Bonney
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Marines, Kizaru, Unknown person #8, Bonney, York as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The rocks crew has made Landfall!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: What are you marine dogs playing at?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What would you do if something were to happen to us?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are more reasons pirates flooding in from all directions!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Come in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did this leak...?! this event was supposed to be top secret!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're still not certain what the pirates are after!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please be advised!! The West Coast is a danger zone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Reinforce-ments have arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What in the world is happening?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: It's Vice Admiral Garp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Roger..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...AND ROCKS...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHO!! WE'RE SAVED!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know if we're gonna make it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates have docked there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Finally! Do you have any idea how I've felt this past year?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roger!! No using the captain card to call Dibs this time, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...This looks rough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pull those marines back, and see to it that the celestial dragons are protected!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a disgrace, why even bother surrounding the island with ships...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just tell me where I can find Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: God's knights, stand ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "It's absolute mayhem out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We couldn't have asked for a better opportunity!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is this it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Yes!! I don't know which is which, so just eat up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: IVA- CHAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Phew, close one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hand that one over too!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma!! Don't think, just eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: You have to eat it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Munch Manch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to save them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If ye manage to get a single person off this island alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ve can call this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...A victory over them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KUMA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're the bugganeer brat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can either live as a slave or die. Nothing else can be tolerated for some- one of your illk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is what the tides of time have decided.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ARE YOU SOMEBODY IMPORTANT?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I DON'T UNDERSTAND HOW SOMEONE CAN BE BORN TO BE MORE OR LESS IMPORTANT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're born to be a slave... then what's the point in being born at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I have some kind of power now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna use it to save as many people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...As I possibly can...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just like Nika!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hold it, rocks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're in my way, Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that... is precisely why your people needed to be erased.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This fateful incident...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would soon be obscured by the shadows of history.

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
